name: New Facility Registration
description: Create a new facility record in EPA Tier2 Submit 2025 and populate all required fields. The facility must be named 'Eastport Chemical Distribution Center'. Address: 4200 North Point Boulevard, Baltimore, MD 21219. Coordinates: Latitude 39.2631, Longitude -76.5517. Phone: (410) 555-0184. NAICS Code: 424690. Dun & Bradstreet: 078341625. Reporting Year: 2024. Owner/Operator: Eastport Industrial Services LLC, (410) 555-0190, 1500 Thames Street, Suite 200, Baltimore, MD 21231. Emergency Contact: Maria T. Dominguez, EHS Manager, Phone: (410) 555-0147, 24-Hour: (410) 555-0199. Designations: Subject to EPCRA Section 302 (Yes), Subject to CERCLA 103 / EPCRA 304 (No), Subject to RCRA Subtitle C (No). Once all tabs (Facility ID, Owner/Operator, Emergency Contact) and designations are filled, save the file using File > Save As to exactly: C:\Tier2Submit\Data\Eastport_CDC.t2s (create the Data folder if it does not exist).
